name: eclipse-s-core
onCreateCommand: sudo apt-get update && sudo DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends python3 openssl curl ca-certificates python3-venv python3-requests clang libclang-dev tcpdump && python3 .devcontainer/install_certs.py && sudo mkdir -p /usr/local/share/ca-certificates/bosch && sudo cp certs/* /usr/local/share/ca-certificates/bosch && sudo apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends ca-certificates-java openjdk-17-jre-headless && sudo update-ca-certificates && echo "startup --host_jvm_args=-Djavax.net.ssl.trustStore=/etc/ssl/certs/java/cacerts --host_jvm_args=-Djavax.net.ssl.trustStorePassword=changeit" | sudo tee -a /etc/bazel.bazelrc && curl -fsSL https://sh.rustup.rs | sh -s -- -y && export PATH=$HOME/.cargo/bin:$PATH && rustup target add aarch64-unknown-linux-gnu && sudo apt-get install -y gcc-aarch64-linux-gnu g++-aarch64-linux-gnu binutils-aarch64-linux-gnu libc6-arm64-cross libc6-dev-arm64-cross linux-libc-dev-arm64-cross
